description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Some of the applications and notifications handled at Hanno City Hall windows are now available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year through the internet.

【Main Online Services】

• Hanno City Electronic Application and Notification Service: Search for applications and notifications by category or keyword to complete procedures
• My Number Portal "Pittari Service": Electronic applications available through the national My Number Portal
• Public Facility Reservation System: Make reservations for public facilities, enter lottery applications, check availability
• Certificate Convenience Store Delivery: Use your My Number Card to obtain resident certificates and similar documents at convenience stores anytime, including weekends and holidays (except during maintenance)
• Hanno City GIS: View urban planning information, hazard maps, hiking maps, and more
• Email Distribution Service: Receive city announcements and event information at your registered email address
• Procedure Navigator: Get guidance on necessary procedures based on your situation, such as moving or getting married
• Neko no Me Dot Com: Check waiting times at the Citizen Services window and receive notification when it's your turn
• Road Emergency Hotline (#9910): Available 24 hours for reporting road damage and similar issues (LINE reports also accepted)

From April 1, 2024 to March 31, 2025, there were 291 online procedure uses and a total of 87,168 procedures completed.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/johosystem/13006.html
